Probability Calculator

Calculate the probability of events, combinations, and permutations. Enter favorable outcomes and total outcomes.

FAQ

How to calculate probability?

Probability = Number of favorable outcomes / Total number of outcomes. Example: rolling a 6 on a die = 1/6 ≈ 0.167 or 16.7%.

What is the difference between permutation and combination?

Permutation considers order (nPr = n!/(n-r)!). Combination does not consider order (nCr = n!/(r!(n-r)!)).
